headline: Jabil Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., July 16, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock to shareholders of record as of August 14, 2026. The dividend is payable on September 2, 2026.

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Jabil, CECO Environmental and Klarna
summary: Jabil, CECO Environmental and Klarna stand out for accelerating earnings growth, highlighting momentum that could support stocks in the second half of 2026.

headline: Jabil Opens Next-Generation Intelligent Logistics Hub in Penang
summary: PENANG, Malaysia, July 16, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), a global leader in engineering, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions, has opened its next-generation logistics hub in Penang.
